evals.prompt: I want to add a RACI matrix view to ProcessFlow — right now we only have swimlane rendering. The RACI should show which roles are Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, and Informed for each step in a process.
evals.expected_output: Interactive discovery questions about the RACI feature, followed by a comprehensive PRD saved to docs/prds/, and a roadmap created/updated at docs/ROADMAP.md

assertions.text: A PRD file exists in outputs with RACI in the filename
PRD contains a Problem Statement section
PRD contains testable acceptance criteria with checkbox items
PRD breaks work into numbered implementation phases
PRD explicitly defines what is out of scope
A ROADMAP.md file exists in outputs
Roadmap references or links to the PRD document
Discovery or clarifying questions were asked before writing the PRD

evals.prompt: What's the status of the project? What should I work on next?
evals.expected_output: Checks for docs/ROADMAP.md, reports that none exists yet (fresh project), summarizes the codebase state, and asks what the user wants to work on

assertions.text: Response acknowledges that no roadmap exists yet
Response summarizes the current codebase state or architecture
Response asks the user what they want to work on next
Response does NOT invent features or progress that do not exist

evals.prompt: Let's build a notification system that alerts users when a process status changes from Draft to Approved. I want in-app notifications and eventually email too.
evals.expected_output: Discovery questions about notification preferences, user roles, urgency. Then a PRD covering Firestore notifications collection, real-time listeners, UI component, with email as Phase 2. Roadmap updated.

assertions.text: A PRD file exists in outputs
PRD describes Firestore collection or schema for notifications
Email notifications are scoped to Phase 2 or later, not Phase 1
A ROADMAP.md file exists in outputs
Discovery or clarifying questions were asked before writing the PRD
